reconciliation.title: Finance operations follow-up
reconciliation.note: Review key finance operations and record a clear decision: OK, needs proof, mismatch, or follow-up.

help.purposeNote: This screen helps non-accounting operators track finance operations and spot issues (amount mismatch, missing proof, missing details). Save a clear decision and note so the team stays aligned.

steps.openRow: Open any row to review it (click the row).
steps.pickStatus: Pick a simple status (OK, mismatch, needs proof, etc.).
steps.addNote: Add a short note describing what is needed next.
steps.openJournal: Use “Open details” to inspect the recorded entry when available.

filters.queryPlaceholder: Search by source, payment, refund, settlement, or note

table.tip: Tip: Click any row to open review. “Open details” appears only when detailed entry data exists.
